title: Invisible string (tripwire)
description: dev: TWS this mod makes the "block" of string invisible
body: This lightweight Minecraft mod removes the visible block texture of placed string, making it completely invisible while keeping all of its normal functionality. It’s designed for builders who want tripwire mechanics without the visual clutter. The mod will only be updated if Mojang changes the relevant file names, as no other maintenance is required. (I would add a gallery image but the entire point is that there is nothing to see.)
